name.ja: <ruby>噂<rt>うわさ</rt></ruby>の<ruby>忍<rt>にん</rt></ruby><ruby>者<rt>じゃ</rt></ruby>ゴエゴエ

requirement.en: During the turn you Normal Summoned this card.

effect.en: Draw 1 card. Then, send 1 card from your hand to the Graveyard. Then, you can Set 1 "Ninjitsu Art of Ultimate Transformation" from your Graveyard to your Spell & Trap Zone. This turn, you can only attack with WIND Attribute Warrior Type monsters, and you cannot activate the effect of "Goe Goe the Rumored Ninja".
